placements.overview: UG Degree (3 year) : In year 2018-19, for 3 year UG Degree, a total of 1119 students were admitted at Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam and 793 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 793 students 210 were placed with median salary of INR 120000 and 178 students opted for higher studies. A total of 1138 students were admitted in year 2019-20 for 3 year UG degree at Government Arts College, Udhagamandalamand 873 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 873 students 220 were placed with median salary of INR 120000 and 203 students opted for higher studies. PG Degree (2 year) : In year 2019-20, for 2 year PG Degree, a total of 294 students were admitted at Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam and 267 completed their graduation in 2020-21. Out of 267 students 63 were placed with median salary of INR 150000 and 86 students opted for higher studies. A total of 267 students were admitted in year 2020-21 for 2 year PG degree at Government Arts College, Udhagamandalamand 239 completed their graduation in 2021-22. Out of 239 students 52 were placed with median salary of INR 150000 and 87 students opted for higher studies.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Business & Management Studies, IT & Software and Accounting & Commerce. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc., B.Com and B.A. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM, M.Sc. and MCA. The fee structure for the Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam programmes is around INR 3,740.

faqs.answer: A:    Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam is a well-known institution for M.Phil, Ph.D, M.Com, M.Sc, M.A, MBA/PGDM, B.A, B.Com, B.Sc. courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam has course specializations in Botany, Chemistry, Physics, Zoology, Computer Science, Mathematics, English, International Business, Biology, Electronics.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in History - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and generous faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Many private limited companies offer placements for students, including TVS and others. The basic salary that is offered is around Rs. 15,000 INR per month. 50% of students are getting internships. Many students join in history because of the availability of the course and it's affordability.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are lab, library, and hostel facilities. Hostels are basically from the government side, which are AD welfare hostels run by the government of Tamil Nadu. And the college has heritage infrastructure because it was built by the British during British rule. Food is average, and sports facilities are there.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Education without expenditure.

review_content.Placements: There is no good placement cell in college. Top companies do not approach for placement. The average package is around 12K, which is very much less for a postgraduate degree holder. The internship program is subject to the students' own interest and isn't provided by the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, there are a few facilities for the lab but don't have enough equipment for experiments. Wi-Fi facilities are provided only to faculty members. Classrooms are enough. Hostel facilities are provided for all community students, and boys' and girls' hostels are separate with a long distance between them.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Value for money and good environment.

review_content.Placements: Students are eligible for placements after the 3rd semester in masters and the 5th semester in bachelors. There are no such big companies that approached. A few exceptional cases are being approached by Wipro via government job searches. Students are hardly placed in good jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: This government college is the oldest in the district and was built in 1955 so the infrastructure is quite good and has good library facilities. No Wi-Fi environment. Classrooms are average. There are separate hostels for SC students and BC students. Average food in the hostel. Medical and sports facilities are above average.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Wild Life Biology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam.

review_content.Placements: Our course mainly focuses on individual research summits and offers quotas for government jobs. There are job offers from NGOs and internship options available. Top roles offered are forest ranger, forest officer, conservationist, zookeeper, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Libraries, labs, classrooms, etc., are available. Government hostels are available. The college is settled on a hilltop and has a good atmosphere to learn and explore.
review_content.Faculty: Our teachers are supportive and well-trained. The teaching quality is good. The course curriculum is framed by Bharathiyar University. It is very simple and informative.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Government Arts College, Udhagamandalam.

review_content.Placements: There are no direct placements. Few companies come to college for placements, but they are not top companies in the market. The packages offered are from 15,000-25,000 only. For high packages, we have to look for off-campus placements. The passed-out students are rarely placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure are not up to the mark. Labs are good, and the equipment is good. No Wi-Fi facilities are provided. It has a good library with plenty of books. Hostels are not good. Mainly SC hostel doesn't have good infrastructure. Students staying here don't get proper food. Mess is not good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Our college gives value for money because it is a government college.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements and no industrial visits. At the end of the semester, few companies visit for placement. The salary package will be around Rs.10,000 to 15,000 per month. Response from the company is not good.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no proper facility for the chemistry lab. There are no proper classes, no ICT classes, and no digital learning. Benches in the class are too old and not enough space for students. Hostel is not up to mark and no proper food is served to the hostelers.

faqs.question: What is the scope of MBA?
faqs.answer:
The scope of MBA course is increasing day by day. MBA is one of the big job oriented professional programme and the most one which has been sought by the students. Once you have completed your degree, you have a great job opportunity in the industrial world. You may the manager or executive in term of designation.
The management term is most suited to the managers and that's why it is the way, where you can reach on the top of the height as soon as possible by using your leadership and working proficiency. An MBA professional always plays a vital role in his/her company and this is why he used to keep in touch with the board of directors. No need to specify the companies who recruit the MBA professionals. All sectors including government and public have various industries, companies, institutions or related organizations, come in the job prospective fields for an MBA professional.
Some job profiles are listed here:
Brand Manager
Account Manager
International Business Manager
Marketing Executive
Business Technical Consultant
All the best.

A:    People's College, Nanded provides programmes including M.Phil, Ph.D, M.A, M.Com, MBA/PGDM, PG Diploma, B.A, B.Com, BBA in streams such as Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, Law, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in English, Tax Law.

individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely satisfied with this course. I highly recommended it to others.

content.Placements: Students were placed from our course with 75% of marks. The highest salary package offered was 7 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 5 LPA, so it was a great package. faqs.answer: A:    Sagar Institute of Pharmaceutical Sciences provides programmes including M.Pharma, MBA/PGDM, D.Pharma, B.Pharma in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. reviews_list.review_title: Inside the college, run by its students.

review_content.Placements: The placements of students are pretty well. Approximately 50 to 55 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA, followed by an average package of 4 LPA. Local pharmaceutical companies as well as other state's pharmaceutical companies come here to hire students. 60 percent of the students get internships in mostly other state's pharmaceutical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very nice. The institute provides projector-installed classrooms that are well-furnished. They provide Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. The institute also has a well-stocked library. No hostel facility is provided by the college. A medical dispensary is available in the college with a very limited sports facility.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: College: An important part of a student’s life.

review_content.Placements: In my course, 30 to 35 percent of students got placed every year. There's no such official information provided by the Institute of the highest and lowest package, but an average package is of 2 to 3 LPA. Some local pharmaceutical companies come here to hire the students and provide them with work experience through internships. 40 to 45 percent of students get internships in local area pharmaceutical companies as well as some other state pharmaceutical companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are pretty good! The institute has well-furnished classrooms as well as installed projectors in them. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and the library has a vast variety of books. Proper lab facilities are also provided by the institute to perform and understand course-related experiments. No hostel facility is provided by the institute. There is a little facility for sports.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My way of seeing my college.

review_content.Placements: There is a very low placement rate of this college. Maybe 30 percent of the students get placed every year. The average package is 5LPA and the highest package is 7LPA. Some local pharmaceutical companies hire the students from here. 40 to 45 percent of the students get internships in local area pharmaceutical companies. And some get internships in different cities by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: There's not a very high-class and well-developed infrastructure structure provided by the college. Classrooms are quite good with installed projectors in them. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Different labs are also there, like the chemistry lab. A small library is there with limited books. No hostel facility is provided by the college.

The average salary offered is Rs. 30,000 per month and the lowest salary offered is Rs. 20,000 per month. Shyncem is company that hires the most number of students. Internships are provided in 3rd semester.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for my course are average. Wi-Fi connectivity is available over a particular area of college. Proper labs are there for better understanding and practical knowledge of students. Classrooms are average. Medical facilitiy is available in college in case of emergency. Food available in canteen is pretty good and eatable. Sports opportunities are provided every year by sending students to RGPV nodal.

individual_reviews.course: M.Pharma. in Pharmaceutical Chemistry - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, facilities and campus.

content.Placements: The college provides placements in the third semester. Many large companies recruit students from our college. However, the placement offers depend on the employment cycle. The average salary offered by the pharmaceutical industry is 3.4 lakhs per annum, and the highest salary offered by Cipla Laboratory Ltd. was 5 lakhs per annum for the last batch.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure at this college is good, but the environment is more like a school. Unlike college, we can't sit free once we enter the college. Wi-Fi, a library, practical labs, and other basic facilities are available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Inside the college, run by its students.

content.Placements: The placements of students are pretty well. Approximately 50 to 55 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 6 LPA and the lowest package is 3 LPA, followed by an average package of 4 LPA. Local pharmaceutical companies as well as other state's pharmaceutical companies come here to hire students. 60 percent of the students get internships in mostly other state's pharmaceutical companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for our course are very nice. The institute provides projector-installed classrooms that are well-furnished. They provide Wi-Fi facilities all over the campus. The institute also has a well-stocked library. No hostel facility is provided by the college. A medical dispensary is available in the college with a very limited sports facility.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College: An important part of a student’s life.

content.Placements: In my course, 30 to 35 percent of students got placed every year. There's no such official information provided by the Institute of the highest and lowest package, but an average package is of 2 to 3 LPA. Some local pharmaceutical companies come here to hire the students and provide them with work experience through internships. 40 to 45 percent of students get internships in local area pharmaceutical companies as well as some other state pharmaceutical companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for my course are pretty good! The institute has well-furnished classrooms as well as installed projectors in them. The Wi-Fi facility is available, and the library has a vast variety of books. Proper lab facilities are also provided by the institute to perform and understand course-related experiments. No hostel facility is provided by the institute. There is a little facility for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My way of seeing my college.

content.Placements: There is a very low placement rate of this college. Maybe 30 percent of the students get placed every year. The average package is 5LPA and the highest package is 7LPA. Some local pharmaceutical companies hire the students from here. 40 to 45 percent of the students get internships in local area pharmaceutical companies. And some get internships in different cities by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: There's not a very high-class and well-developed infrastructure structure provided by the college. Classrooms are quite good with installed projectors in them. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Different labs are also there, like the chemistry lab. A small library is there with limited books. No hostel facility is provided by the college.

reviews.review_text: Life on campus is good. Along with learning, the extra curriculum is also good. The annual fest 'COGNOISE' is organized every year, which includes a tech fest as well as sports, cultural activities, DJ night, and more. The best books and journals are available in complete stock. reviews.review_heading: Review for faculties and departments of placements.
reviews.review_text: The fest is conducted in the month of April. Several activities are conducted, like sports, dance, drama, and all other activities. The 2 days of the fests are most enjoyable, and the traditional day is also conducted. The library is excellent and well maintained; all kinds of books are available and there is no need to buy from outside stores; extracurricular activities are conducted. There is a club named Pharma Helping Hand run by the student; it is very good and helpful for the people.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good, with proper lab library classrooms and canteens. Pharmacist day is also celebrated in our college; it offer a solid foundation for a career in such various settings as hospital clinic and retail pharmacies with a focus on Healthcare improvement.

reviews.review_heading: My opinion on my college facilities.
reviews.review_text: Not having fests around the year is a great drawback of this college, but a single sports fest is held every year in the college known as AVAHAN. The library in this college is well-equipped with all kinds of books and journals. Classrooms are in good condition for the new departments only, and classes are just normal without digital boards.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the teachers.

The pharmaceutical labs are equipped with all necessary equipment, and there is no shortage of required materials and chemicals. The classrooms are fully furnished, and Wi-Fi is available for official use only. The hostel is well-facilitated, providing a good environment.

Shri Dharmasthala Manjunatheshwara University provides 69 UG, PG and Certificate courses in 43 specialisations, namely Anaesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community Medicine and Community Medicine Nursing. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, Science and Nursing. The total fee at Shri Dharmasthala Manjunatheshwara University ranges between INR 7,000 to 21,42,090. Shri Dharmasthala Manjunatheshwara University has a student intake of 6 for all the courses. review_summary.college_name: Shri Dharmasthala Manjunatheshwara University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college offers a bright future opportunity.

content.Placements: Clinical postings are conducted daily in our college. The PG selection ratio of our college is also good. Our batch has a strength of 150+ students, which is very good. Many of our seniors were selected by reputed medical colleges after their PG.
content.Infrastructure: We have very good infrastructure. You will get hostel and mess facilities. There is a library in the college and we also have a study room in our hostel where we can study without any kind of disturbance. If you are a North Indian student, you can get North Indian food in the mess. This is the plus point of our mess, as a lot of South Indian colleges serve South Indian food, but this isn't the case with our college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: A good medical school to learn.

content.Placements: Our college provides one of the best result among colleges under RGUHS. Even one of my senior was university topper 3 years back. And now she is pursuing her PG from top medical college in Bangalore, and the list goes on. It gets easier if we get to see live cases and then study which goes well here.
content.Infrastructure: The hostels are well maintained, double seater with common bathroom, we get full balanced diet in our mess, library has all the latest books of collection and one large ground along with basketball court is there and Wi-Fi is provided too in library along with the access for e - learning.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Awesome college with good faculty and good events.

content.Placements: Placements are too good at least 75% get placed and rest are the people who go for family hospital and higher studies. The highest package is about 15 Lacs and the lowest is average. At least 90% people get internship since they have their own hospitals and they offer based on the interest of roles.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel is clean and spacious and there are different types of rooms are available. Mess food are good and there are different mess available and with all dishes and college course is good I am enjoying my course, I am getting so much of practical exposure.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The bestest college ever .

content.Placements: Around 100 students were there in the batch. There was no such thing as placement as it is a field of medicine and not engineering. There won't be any recruitment. We didn't get internships in our own college and you will get a lot bad experiences here.
content.Infrastructure: Very good availability of staff and the materials used in dentistry, everything is provided by the college only. The library is open for all the days of the year except 2 days that too during some festivals. The availability of food and the hostel is very good. The food is so good that I am missing it even now.

individual_reviews.course: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It has a really good patient flow.

content.Placements: The college has a really good patient flow. We can learn almost all types of procedures in the BDS itself. They have 100 seats for the BDS course and almost 90% of students can pass in the first attempt. Job opportunities are also more since the college has made a name for itself.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is above average. There are too many rules to follow if we are staying in a hostel. Mess food is messed up, but comparatively, it is better. The library is big. It has Wi-Fi. The campus is quite big too. Mess, canteen, and juice center are situated within the campus, but I would say they all serve average food.

faqs.question: Which courses does Rajagiri College of Social Sciences offer?

review_content.General: The Social Sciences college comes under the Hill campus. There is an old and new block. The new block consists of 8 floors and three well-equipped canteens. There are many avenues for programs. There are separate gyms for men and women. There is a basketball court and parking space for students. It is a very green campus and runs on solar power entirely. The classes are now equipped with air conditioning. There are separate hostels for men and women. The women? S hostel has a curfew of 7:00 pm and the men? S hostel has a curfew of 8:30 pm. The hostels provide non-vegetarian and vegetarian options every day of the week. There are no washing machines. Room cleaning will be done every now and then. The sister who runs the hostel can be a bit forward and strict.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Best college in entire Kerala state. No.1.

review_content.Placements: Students were eligible for placement after 3rd semester however pre-placement offers are given during 2nd semester internship period is mostly 3-6 months. 79 companies come to date which included EY, Deloitte, KPMG, ICICI, PWC, Phonepe, Muthoot Finance, TCS, Asian paints, Berger paints etc. In placement 6.5 LPA is the average package. Rajagiri makes sure students go through various training programmes to help them to grab the best offers. I got an internship in SFO Technologies, Royal Enfield and was placed in KPMG so I got a good start in my career.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (B.B.A.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: More than 90% of students are placed. There was no specific package offered. Fee was fixed at Rs.1,60,000 per semester. Top recruiting companies are Hp, HCL, and Infosys. Around 80% got internships. Top roles offered are based on good leadership skills, communication skills, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and study environment are so good. We have a nature-friendly environment. We have Wi-Fi, labs, big classrooms, and a very big library. There are both girls and boys hostels. There are 2 girls hostels for undergraduates and postgraduates separately. We have a very big boys hostel with all the facilities.
